title: stravadium horsfieldii
intro: Stravadium horsfieldii, also known as the Indian snake root, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. Its roots and rhizomes contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, offering various health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation. Indian snake root is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, to treat a range of ailments.
